sections.sectionTitle: Hezekiah in Babylon pana Kamtaite Saang

verses.text: Tua hun laitakin Baladan' tapa, Babylon kumpi ahi Merodak-baladan in Hezekiah a ci na-in a damkikna thu za ahih manin ama kiangah laikhak leh letsong tawh tangmite a sawl hi

Hezekiah in amaute limtakin zin na do hi. Amah in ama dangka inn, ngun, kham, paknamtui, sathau manpha, a galvan koihna inn khempeuh, leh a vankoihna sunga a kimu theite khempeuh amaute a na lak hi. Ama innsung hita leh, ama gamsunga om khempeuh hita leh Hezekiah in amaute a lahloh bangmah omlo hi

Tua ciangin Kumpi Hezekiah kiang-ah kamsang Isaiah hong pai-in, “Hih mite in bang hong gen ahi uh hiam? Koi lai panin nang kiangah hong pai ahi uh hiam?” a ci hi. Hezekiah in, “Amaute, a gamlapi, Babylon gam panin kei kiangah a hong pai uh ahi hi,” a ci hi

Amah in, “Amaute in na innsungah bang teng mu ahi uh hiam?” a ci hi. Hezekiah in, “Amaute in ka innsunga a om khempeuh a vekin mu khin uh hi. Ka vankoihna innte sunga nate amau ka lahloh omlo hi,” ci-in a dawng hi
Tua ciangin Isaiah in Hezekiah kiangah, “Vanglian Topa' thu ngai in
En in, na innsunga a omte khempeuh leh na pu na pate in tuni donga a kholsate, Babylon-ah a kipuak ding ni hong tung ding hi; bangmah kinusialo ding hi, Topa in ci hi
Nang' sung panin a suak, nangma tapate kimkhat kipaikhiatpih ding a, Babylon kumpipa' innsungah innsungmang nasep kisemsak ding hi,” a ci hi

Tua ciangin Hezekiah in Isaiah kiangah, “Nong gensa Topa' thu a hoih ahi hi,” a ci hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amah in, “Kei' nuntak hun sungin nopna leh lungmuan'na om buang ding hi,” ci-in a ngaihsun hi.
